mapper.insert: insert into orders(id, order_no, goods_id, num, user_id, status, time) values (#{id}, #{orderNo}, #{goodsId}, #{num}, #{userId}, #{status}, #{time})
mapper.select: SELECT c.name as name, count(*) as value FROM goods g JOIN category c ON g.category_id = c.id GROUP BY c.name
SELECT status as name, count(*) as value FROM orders GROUP BY status
SELECT c.name as name, count(*) as value FROM orders o JOIN goods g ON o.goods_id = g.id JOIN category c ON g.category_id = c.id WHERE o.user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY c.name
SELECT status as name, count(*) as value FROM orders WHERE user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY status
select IFNULL(sum(orders.num * goods.price), 0) from orders join goods on orders.goods_id = goods.id where orders.user_id = #{userId} and orders.status != '已取消'
select count(*) from orders where user_id = #{userId} and status = '待收货'
